description: Create a content slide titled 'Gifting remains a significant part of luxury spending' with a two-column layout featuring a stacked vertical bar chart of gifting vs. own consumption by year on the left and supporting consumer quotes on the right.

header.headline: Gifting remains a significant part of luxury spending

left.title: "What percent of the luxury goods you’ve purchased is for gifting vs. own consumption?" % of luxury spending

items.text: “Giving luxury goods as business gifts can show my taste and social status, also it makes the recipients feel important and respected.”
“Luxury gifts always pleasantly surprise my clients and they help me get the deal done more easily.”

footer.source: Source: Bain Survey of Luxury Goods Consumers in Mainland China 2011 (n=1,959); Literature search
